## Checklist

- [ ] My code conforms to the code style and formatting standards (`pnpm run format:check`).
- [ ] My code compiles and passes typescript verification checks (`pnpm run typecheck`).
- [ ] ESLint linting passes successfully (`pnpm run lint`).
- [ ] Production build succeeds without errors (`pnpm run build`).
- [ ] There are no exposed credentials, private keys, or API tokens committed.
